bird.summary: The Timor sparrow (Padda fuscata), also known as Timor dusky sparrow, is a small passerine bird. The bird inhabits the grasslands and lowla…

locations.name: 帝汶島
locations.summary: 帝汶島（印尼語：Pulau Timor，葡萄牙語：Ilha de Timor）是位於馬來群島南端的島嶼，為小巽他群島中面積最大者，總面積約30,777平方公里。該島地處東南亞海域，座標約為9°14′S 124°56′E，北臨弗洛勒斯海，南…

relations.evidence: The bird inhabits the grasslands and lowlands of the Timor archipelago with its distribution typically sparse
